subcodes.first_line: O Maryam! The Ancient King proclaimeth from within the Most Great Prison: This day is the Sovereign of days; know thou its value and arise in remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مریم مالک قدم در سجن اعظم میفرماید امروز مالک روزهاست قدرش را بدان و بذکر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment
